xml.name: version_command
xml.version_command: python - <<'PY' import importlib.util spec = importlib.util.find_spec("conf.conf") if spec is None or spec.origin is None: print("beacon2-ri-tools") else: import os print(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(spec.origin))) PY

param.name: dataset_id
param.label: Dataset identifier
param.help: Value passed to --datasetId and used to build Beacon identifiers.

param.name: only_process_reads_with_allele_frequency
param.label: Only process reads with allele frequency

param.name: num_rows
param.label: Maximum number of rows or variants to process (0 = unlimited)

param.name: custom_conf_py
param.label: Custom conf.py (overrides ALL settings above)
param.help: Upload your own optimized conf/conf.py file for complete control

macros.token:
# Auto-generated by the Galaxy wrapper (credentials from your Galaxy server config).
csv_folder = './csv' output_docs_folder = './out/' entry_type = '$entry_type' only_process_reads_with_allele_frequency = $only_process_reads_with_allele_frequency populations_by_allele_counts = $populations_by_allele_counts reference_genome = '$reference_genome' case_level_data = $case_level_data exact_heterozygosity = $exact_heterozygosity num_rows = $num_rows verbosity = $verbosity
# ── Credentials from Galaxy server config (UNTOUCHED) ── database_host = '${database.database_host}' database_port = ${database.database_port} database_name = '${database.database_name}'
